hero.job-subtitle: Digital engineering graduate focused on game development, software engineering, and technical design.

profile.column-1-head: Proficiency in several <emphasis>programming languages and frameworks</emphasis>, including:
profile.column-2-head: Proficiency in several <emphasis>tools and production workflows</emphasis>, including:

portfolio.description: My portfolio is filled with the projects I have been able to carry out, alone or in teams, during my digital engineering studies at Télécom SudParis, as a school or personal project. You will mainly find video games in this section!

about.p1: My name is Adrien Schroedel, I'm a software and game developer trained at Télécom SudParis. Throughout my studies, I contributed to multiple <portfolioLink>game development projects</portfolioLink> in both academic and personal contexts.
about.p2: I enjoy combining strong technical execution with collaborative work. I contribute to gameplay systems, tooling, and production workflows while working closely with multidisciplinary teams.
about.p3: My objective is to join a team with high standards, clear values, and a strong collective culture to deliver impactful digital experiences.

contact.subtitle:
Do you have a question about game development, software engineering, or another topic?
Let's connect. I will be glad to discuss your needs.
